new_value: Completed in d2ce3ff90: independent RFC 8724 fragmentation vectors cover regular/All-0/All-1, RCS, ACK bitmaps and recovery, retransmission, retry exhaustion and aborts, capacity boundaries, controls, and malformed inputs. Shared Draft-07 schema and typed Python/Rust/C mechanical consumers added. Validation: Python/Ruff 151 passed, Rust fixture test and Rust 2021 formatting passed, generated header passed strict host C11 compilation, git diff --check passed, and three final independent reviews found no blocking defects. Zephyr execution remains unavailable without a west workspace/AWS authentication.
